title: DOM Dialog System Overhaul, GIF Upload & Modern Scrollbars
summary: Replaces all native browser alert/confirm/prompt calls with fully custom DOM dialogs featuring glass-morphic design, animated entry/exit, keyboard support, and a danger variant. Adds GIF upload support for room and avatar photos. Introduces a global modern teal scrollbar across all scrollable panels.

changes.description: Rewrote all .ui-modal-* CSS. Overlay now uses backdrop-filter: blur(10px) saturate(1.3) with rgba(0,0,0,.7) bg. Panel uses linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(30,41,59,.98), rgba(15,23,42,.99)) with 22px border-radius and layered box-shadow (spread glow + inner rim). New .ui-modal-top-bar holds a 48x48px icon-wrap and a close-X button. .ui-modal-footer has a subtle top border and right-aligned action buttons. Added .ui-danger-panel variant (red glow border and tint). Confirm button is teal→purple gradient with cyan glow; danger confirm is solid red gradient; cancel is muted semi-transparent chip. New keyframes uiMoOut and uiMoSlideOut power the closing animation via the .ui-closing class.

changes.area: Modal JS — uiAlert / uiConfirm / uiPrompt Rebuild
changes.description: All three dialog functions rebuilt from scratch. New _uiClose(ov, resolve, value) helper adds .ui-closing, waits for animationend, then removes the overlay and calls resolve — ensuring smooth exit before DOM removal. New _uiPanelHtml() shared template generates all dialog HTML from a single options object (icon, title, msg, danger, hasInput, confirmLabel, cancelLabel, alertOnly). Global document keydown handler stored on ov._keyHandler and removed on close to prevent listener leaks; Enter confirms, Escape cancels for all dialog types. Close-X button wired in all three dialogs.

changes.area: Raw confirm() Removal — Style Reset Button
changes.description: styleResetDefaultsBtn.onclick was the last place using native confirm(). Converted handler to async and replaced with await uiConfirm('Reset ALL styles to factory defaults?', { title:'Reset to Factory Defaults', icon:'⚠️', confirmLabel:'Reset Everything', danger:true }).

changes.area: Raw confirm() Removal — UPS Block User Button
changes.description: The block-user button in the User Profile Screen was using native confirm(). Converted the click handler to an async arrow function and replaced with await uiConfirm(..., { danger:true }). closeUserProfileScreen() is now always called after the action regardless of outcome.

Room settings panel now has an inline file input (accept='image/*,image/gif') inside a label button. GIF files skip canvas compression entirely so animations are preserved; non-GIF images are compressed to max 400px / 82% JPEG. The pending data URL is stored on body._rsbPendingPhotoDataUrl and consumed by the save handler.

_handlePhotoFile now detects image/gif and reads the raw data URL, bypassing the canvas resize path. File size limit raised from 5 MB to 8 MB. photoFileInput and photoCameraInput accept attributes updated to 'image/*,image/gif'.

Added a global * scrollbar block: 5px width/height, transparent track, rgba(56,189,248,.22) teal thumb with 99px border-radius, hover brightens to .55 opacity. Opt-out applied to html, body, .composer textarea, .prf-tabs, and [data-hide-scroll]. Removed now-redundant individual scrollbar-width:none overrides from .msgs, .log, .room-list, and .welcome-container, which all now use the global thin scrollbar.
